input.title: Payment service down — checkout failures
input.description: All users attempting checkout receive 503. Started 08:42 UTC. Payment microservice pods are crash-looping. Logs show 'connection refused' to stripe-gateway. ~500 transactions/min blocked.

input.title: Product catalog images not loading
input.description: Homepage and product listing pages show broken image icons. CDN origin returns 404 for /images/products/*. Started after last deployment at 14:30 UTC. Cart and checkout still work.

input.title: Database CPU at 100% — queries timing out
input.description: app-db CPU sustained at 100% for 20 minutes. Read queries for product search timing out after 30s. Write path (orders) still working. No new deployments. Postgres slow query log shows missing index on products.category_id.

input.title: Order confirmation emails not being sent
input.description: Customers are not receiving order confirmation emails since 10:00 UTC. Email queue depth growing: 1,200 messages pending. SMTP relay logs show authentication error 535. Order records are created successfully in the DB.

input.title: Search returns wrong results after catalog import
input.description: Full-text search returns products from old catalog. ETL job ran at 03:00 UTC importing new SKUs. Elasticsearch index was not refreshed. Users see stale results for new product names.

input.title: Cart service memory leak — OOM pods
input.description: 3 out of 5 cart-service pods OOMKilled in the last hour. heap dump shows 50k session objects not being GC'd. Session TTL config was removed in last merge. Kubernetes auto-restarting pods every ~15 minutes.

input.title: Slow homepage load — P99 latency 8s
input.description: Homepage P99 latency jumped from 400ms to 8s starting 16:00 UTC. Product recommendation service response time increased 20x. No deployment. Recommendation model inference endpoint CPU spike to 90%.

input.title: Admin dashboard login broken — 401 for all admins
input.description: All admin users get 401 Unauthorized when logging into /admin since 09:15 UTC. Regular customer logins work fine. Auth service log shows 'JWT signing key mismatch'. Key rotation was performed at 09:00 UTC without rolling the admin session tokens.

input.title: Inventory sync lag — stock levels outdated by 4h
input.description: Inventory service is showing stock counts from 4 hours ago. Real-time sync from warehouse API is failing silently. Webhook from warehouse not reaching inventory service. Firewall rule change at 12:00 UTC blocked inbound port 8443.

input.title: Checkout total price calculation wrong — tax missing
input.description: Multiple customers reporting checkout total does not include tax. Tax calculation microservice returning 0.00 for all EU countries since 11:30 UTC. Deployment of tax-service v2.1.4 introduced a regex bug in country-code parsing.

input.title: Redis session cache eviction — users logged out
input.description: Thousands of users suddenly logged out starting 15:00 UTC. Redis maxmemory-policy set to allkeys-lru after a config push. Active session keys evicted under memory pressure. Redis memory usage was at 95%.

input.title: Shipping cost API returning 500 for UK addresses
input.description: All UK shipping cost estimates fail with HTTP 500. Carrier API returns 'invalid postcode format'. UK postcode regex updated in carrier v3 but our adapter still sends old format (no space). Affects approximately 8% of checkout flows.

input.title: Discount code validation slow — 3s delay per apply
input.description: Coupon/discount code validation endpoint taking 3-4 seconds since this morning. Users are experiencing slow checkout but no errors. Promotion service is querying promo_codes table without index on code column. Affects checkout UX but orders complete successfully.

input.title: PDF invoice generation errors for 2% of orders
input.description: About 2% of order invoices failing to generate PDF. Error: 'font file not found'. Affects orders with special characters in customer names (e.g. accented letters). Workaround: customers can request manual invoice from support. No revenue impact.

input.title: Mobile app push notifications delayed by 15 minutes
input.description: Push notifications for order status updates are arriving 15-20 minutes late since last night. Notification queue is processing but backlogged. No messages lost. Delayed delivery to iOS and Android. APNS/FCM connections are healthy.

input.title: Product review pagination missing last page
input.description: Product review section on product pages skips the last page of reviews. Page 5 of 5 shows 0 items when total count indicates 10 items. Bug introduced by off-by-one error in pagination logic in frontend v2.3.1. No data loss, cosmetic issue.

input.title: Dark mode toggle not persisting across sessions
input.description: Users who enable dark mode find it reverted to light mode after closing and reopening the browser. Preference stored in localStorage only, not synced to user profile. Low user complaints. No functional impact on shopping flows.

input.title: Footer copyright year shows 2023 instead of 2024
input.description: Footer across all pages still shows copyright year 2023. Static text not updated after new year. No functional impact. Minor cosmetic issue. Quick fix required in footer template component.
